accuracy.explanation: The model correctlty predicted 100.0% of all samples.This is considered excellent performance.

precision.explanation: When the model predicts a positive class, it is correct 100.0% of the time.This is considered excellent performance.

recall.explanation: The model successfully identified 100.0% of the actual positive samples.This is considered excellent performance.

f1_score.explanation: The balance between Precision and Recall is 100.0%This is considered excellent performance.

overall_assessment.summary: The model demonstrates excellent predictive performance across all evaluation metrics
overall_assessment.recommendation: The model is suitable for deployment after validation on unseen data.

improvement_suggestions.title: Check for Overfitting
improvement_suggestions.message: The model achieved nearly perfect accuracy. Verify the result using cross-validation or an independent test dataset to ensure the model generalizes well.

improvement_suggestions.title: Balanced Precision and Recall
improvement_suggestions.message: The model maintains a healthy balance between precision and recall, indicating consistent prediction quality.

improvement_suggestions.title: Validate Before Deployment
improvement_suggestions.message: The current model performs very well. Validate it using cross-validation or an independent test dataset before deploying it in production.
